message:
fix(wal-fec): eliminate TOCTOU race in persist_wal_fec_raptorq_repair_symbols

Replace the exists() + fs::write() sequence with atomic create_new
(O_EXCL) to prevent another writer from silently overwriting the
sidecar between the check and the write.  If another process wins
the race, we gracefully fall through to the read-modify-write path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
